# Damini Estate

> Damini Estate (Damini Real Estate L.L.C) is a RERA-licensed (License 57358), TruBroker-accredited full-service real estate brokerage based in Business Bay, Dubai, UAE. We help clients buy, sell, rent, and invest in residential, off-plan, and commercial property across Dubai, and support property-linked Golden Visa relocation. Founded and led by Lola Damini.

## Contact
- WhatsApp: +971 58 572 0882
- Email: info@daminiestate.ae
- Office: Crystal Tower, Office 1102, Business Bay, Dubai, UAE
- Listings: https://www.bayut.com/companies/damini-real-estate-108837/

## Pages
- [Home](https://daminiestate.ae/): Overview, featured Dubai listings, services, and leadership.
- [Properties](https://daminiestate.ae/properties/): Curated Dubai listings; each links to its verified Bayut listing for full details and viewings.
- [Services](https://daminiestate.ae/services/): Residential sales, off-plan investment, commercial real estate, investment advisory, property management, Golden Visa & relocation, plus free mortgage, rental-yield, ROI, and service-charge calculators.
- [About](https://daminiestate.ae/about/): Company story, values, and credentials.
- [Contact](https://daminiestate.ae/contact/): Enquiry form, WhatsApp, email, office, and FAQ.
- [Insights](https://daminiestate.ae/insights/): Guides on Dubai property investment.

- [Off-Plan vs Ready Property in Dubai](https://daminiestate.ae/blog/off-plan-vs-ready-property-dubai/)

- [The Dubai Golden Visa Through Property](https://daminiestate.ae/blog/dubai-golden-visa-property/)

## Notes
- Languages: English and Russian (in-page toggle).
- The site links to Bayut for live listing details while an in-house listings platform is finalised.
- Calculators provide indicative estimates only and are not financial advice.
